name: Mattermost RTL & Telegram Style
description: Transforms Mattermost channel chat into Telegram-like chat bubbles with automatic RTL (Persian/Arabic/Hebrew) text support.

settings_schema.header:
## Mattermost RTL & Telegram Style

Configure the RTL support and Telegram-like bubble UI for your Mattermost channels.

settings.help_text: Automatically detect right-to-left text (Persian, Arabic, Hebrew) and render it correctly. Enabled by default.
Display messages as chat bubbles similar to Telegram: your messages appear on the right, others on the left.
